positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical, and central composition featuring an ethereal fusion of celestial and botanical motifs. The primary elements include a large, stylized crescent moon, intricate winding vines, and swirling nebula patterns, forming a cohesive mandala-like design. The aesthetic should combine bold, clean linework (neo-tattoo style) with crisp, vector art geometry. The color palette must utilize deep indigo and midnight navy blue as the base, contrasting sharply with luminous iridescent gold, opal teal, and soft lavender accents. The overall design must have high contrast and strong silhouette appeal, ensuring it looks flawless when printed on dark apparel.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, poor details, blurry, grainy, noisy, abstract, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, messy, low resolution, jpeg artifacts
